description: A statement, allegation, or assertion made by a figure or entity in news coverage

claim_text.description: The full text of the claim or statement

claimant.description: The person or entity making the claim

date.description: The date the claim was made (ISO 8601 format preferred)

context.description: The context in which the claim was made (e.g., press conference, interview, social media post)

verification_status.description: Current verification status of the claim

evidence.description: Supporting or refuting evidence for the claim
